name: MAC-10 | 渐变迪斯科
descriptionEn: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. It has been custom painted using a pearlescent finish to resemble holographic self-adhesive vinyl. Depending on the light its appearance changes. Watch when you point that thing
descriptionZh: 本质上就是个能射出子弹的盒子，MAC-10 微型冲锋枪拥有高频率的射速，作为交换，它还拥有略逊一筹的精准度和高后坐力。 采用了珠光涂料进行自定义涂装，像极了全息乙烯粘合剂。随着环境光的变化，外观也会产生相应改变。 指着那东西的时候要盯紧了
